name: @midnight-examples/erc20-vault-contract
description: The ERC20 vault Compact contract. src/index.ts is the curated export surface — this IS the "sdk" face of the package.

scripts.compile: COMPACT_PATH=../../../node_modules compact compile --skip-zk --feature-zkir-v3 src/erc20-vault.compact src/managed/erc20-vault && rm -f src/managed/SignetNotifier && ln -sfn ../../../../../node_modules/@sig-net/midnight-contract/dist/managed src/managed/SignetSigner
scripts.compile:zk: COMPACT_PATH=../../../node_modules compact compile --feature-zkir-v3 src/erc20-vault.compact src/managed/erc20-vault && rm -f src/managed/SignetNotifier && ln -sfn ../../../../../node_modules/@sig-net/midnight-contract/dist/managed src/managed/SignetSigner
